MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that this matter has been continued two times for service to be made. No proof of service is filed and this matter is taken off calendar. TRO is vacated.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 . Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
